question: Find the names of stores whose number products is more than the average number of products.
gold_sql: SELECT name FROM shop WHERE number_products  >  (SELECT avg(number_products) FROM shop)
predicted_sql: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_2 GROUP BY T2.col_2 HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM table_3 GROUP BY col_2))
raw_response: SELECT T1.col_2 FROM table_1 AS T1 JOIN table_3 AS T2 ON T1.col_1 = T2.col_2 GROUP BY T2.col_2 HAVING COUNT(*) > (SELECT AVG(cnt) FROM (SELECT COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM table_3 GROUP BY col_2))
